sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (event_id UInt32, event_time DateTime64(3)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY event_id;
SELECT event_id, event_time FROM test_dates WHERE event_time IS NOT NULL;
UPDATE test_dates SET event_time = parseDateTime64BestEffortUSOrNull('02/29/2020 12:00:00') WHERE event_id = 1;
